name: io.github.cwjgege/genflowai
title: GenflowAI
description: Run GenflowAI templates and saved AI creative workflows for ecommerce product visuals, UGC video ads, product videos, image-to-video, text-to-video, asset uploads, and async generation results.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional. Use Bearer <GENFLOWAI_API_KEY> for private saved workflows, asset uploads, template/workflow runs, and async result polling. Public template discovery works without this header.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Optional GenflowAI API key alternative for clients that do not support Authorization bearer headers.
